images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese gravure idol, captured in a surreal fusion of tradition and modernity amidst a cherry blossom season. The lighting is a bright, direct flash style, illuminating her flawless skin texture and silky black hair with ethereal clarity, casting no heavy shadows. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
